Gaby Del Valle 60 minutes ago Dominic Preston An hour ago Samsung’s Z Flip 8 slims down in new leak renders. The fairly reliable leaker OnLeaks has shared his first CAD renders for the Galaxy Z Flip 8, via MyMobiles , and it looks… pretty much identical to the Z Flip 7 , actually. It’s apparently slimmer though, with 0.5mm shaved off when closed, which should make it fractionally more pocketable. Previous Next 1/3 The Flip 8 has the same boxy design and full cover screen as its predecessor according to this leak. Image: OnLeaks / MyMobiles Link Bose’s rugged Soundlink Flex Bluetooth speaker is on sale for up to $50 off Brandon Widder An hour ago Advertiser Content From This is the title for the native ad Andrew Liszewski An hour ago Adobe’s ‘computational photography’ camera app is now available for the iPad. After adding support for the iPhone 17 and its square sensor selfie camera last November, Adobe has updated its Project Indigo camera app to support the iPhone 17e and iPads with at least 6GB of RAM. But Adobe warns that “Project Indigo is not yet tuned for iPad operation” and suggests sticking with an iPhone for an “optimal experience.” Project Indigo App - App Store [App Store] Link Trump Mobile isn’t giving up just yet Dominic Preston Two hours ago Emma Roth Two hours ago Professor Layton is coming to PC and PlayStation for the first time. Arriving later this year, Professor Layton and the New World of Steam will be available on PlayStation 5 and Steam in addition to the Nintendo Switch and Switch 2. There’s still no firm release date for this puzzle-filled title just yet, but you can check out the latest trailer below. Victoria Song Apr 8 Stevie Bonifield Two hours ago France’s government is switching to Linux. France’s Interministerial Directorate for Digital Affairs (DINUM) has announced its “exit from Windows in favor of workstations running on the Linux operating system,” as XDA reports. It’s part of a broader shift away from non-European tech — in January, France’s government also launched its own videoconferencing platform to replace Teams, Zoom, and Google Meet. France's government is ditching Windows for Linux, calling US tech dependence a strategic risk [XDA] Link Emma Roth Two hours ago Prime Video’s pricier “Ultra” plan goes live today. Going ad-free on Prime Video now costs $4.99 per month, instead of $2.99. It also comes with “exclusive” access to 4K streams. Amazon Prime Video nearly doubles the price to go ad-free and stream 4K video Emma Roth Mar 13 Link Cloudflare made a WordPress for AI agents Emma Roth 1:30 PM UTC Stevie Bonifield 1:01 PM UTC Gmail’s end-to-end encryption is now available on its mobile app. Starting this week, enterprise users will be able to send encrypted messages from Gmail’s Android and iOS apps if their organization has the feature enabled. Gmail’s version of E2EE, which uses client-side encryption , has been available since last year , but is still limited to users with enterprise accounts. Gmail end-to-end encryption now available on mobile devices [Google Workspace Updates Blog] Link Dominic Preston 12:16 PM UTC Huawei’s next flagship phones are going big on gradients. The Pura 90 series will launch in China on April 20th, and the phones will be decked out in a series of colorful gradient finishes. GizmoChina has images of the full line of Pura 90 Pro and Pro Max colors, but I’m a fan of this sunset Pro Max Huawei has teased on Weibo . Gradients aren’t new for Huawei — its P20 and P30 phones had similar finishes.
